description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master, on pull requests, and daily. The workflow has multiple jobs: VersionFile, MacOS, Docker_Linux, windows, and CreateRelease. The VersionFile job increments the version. The MacOS job runs on macos-latest and caches LLVM artifacts. The Docker_Linux job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of LLVM and Ubuntu versions, building and testing Docker images. The windows job runs tests on windows-latest. The CreateRelease job creates a release with artifacts from previous jobs.
